root.title: Audio UI Components
root.description: Accessible, composable Audio UI components for React. {{count}} copy-ready blocks and demos covering players, faders, knobs, XY pads, and transport controls, built on top of shadcn/ui.
root.intro: Browse {{count}} audio/ui components for React and Tailwind CSS. Built on shadcn/ui and @audio-ui/react's headless primitives, every block is copy-ready and fully compatible with your shadcn/ui setup.

channel-strip.title: Channel Strip
channel-strip.description: Channel strip patterns combining faders, knobs, and transport controls. {{count}} components.
channel-strip.intro: Browse {{count}} channel strip components for audio/ui, built on top of shadcn/ui.

fader.title: Fader
fader.description: Fader components for level, gain, and mix controls. {{count}} components.
fader.intro: Browse {{count}} fader components for audio/ui, built on top of shadcn/ui.

knob.title: Knob
knob.description: Rotary knob components for continuous parameters like level, cutoff, and pan. {{count}} components.
knob.intro: Browse {{count}} knob components for audio/ui, built on top of shadcn/ui.

playback-speed.title: Playback Speed
playback-speed.description: Playback speed controls for audio and video players. {{count}} components.
playback-speed.intro: Browse {{count}} playback speed components for audio/ui, built on top of shadcn/ui.

player.title: Player
player.description: Audio player components for track playback, queues, and playback speed control. {{count}} components.
player.intro: Browse {{count}} player components for audio/ui, built on top of shadcn/ui.

queue.title: Queue
queue.description: Queue management components for building playlists and up-next lists. {{count}} components.
queue.intro: Browse {{count}} queue components for audio/ui, built on top of shadcn/ui.

sortable-list.title: Sortable List
sortable-list.description: Drag-and-drop sortable list components for reordering tracks and items. {{count}} components.
sortable-list.intro: Browse {{count}} sortable list components for audio/ui, built on top of shadcn/ui.

synth.title: Synth
synth.description: Synth control patterns combining knobs, XY pads, and toggles. {{count}} components.
synth.intro: Browse {{count}} synth components for audio/ui, built on top of shadcn/ui.

track.title: Track
track.description: Track list and grid components for browsing audio content. {{count}} components.
track.intro: Browse {{count}} track components for audio/ui, built on top of shadcn/ui.

transport.title: Transport
transport.description: Transport controls for play, pause, and seek. {{count}} components.
transport.intro: Browse {{count}} transport components for audio/ui, built on top of shadcn/ui.

xypad.title: XY Pad
xypad.description: Two-dimensional XY pad components for filter and effect controls. {{count}} components.
xypad.intro: Browse {{count}} xy pad components for audio/ui, built on top of shadcn/ui.
